claw_rccam_progress.description: R-CCAM cognitive cycle real-time progress query
claw_recall.description: Deep semantic memory retrieval (CRAG + GraphRAG + RAPTOR + Self-RAG + Liquid Neural Memory)

claw_events.description: Event log query (based on TKG temporal knowledge graph)

tokui_render.description: TokUI structured UI rendering (generate DSL + SSE streaming push to frontend)
